---
pagetitle: "Publications — Richard Aubrey White"
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(knitcitations)
d <- knitcitations::read.bibtex("publications.bib")
n_pub <- length(d)
prof <- scholar::get_profile("75oKEWoAAAAJ")
citations <- formatC(prof$total_cites, big.mark = ",", format = "f", digits = 0)
h_index <- formatC(prof$h_index, format = "f", digits = 0)
```

```{=html}
<div class="page">
<div class="mast"><div><p class="kick">Peer-Reviewed Research</p><h1 class="name">Publications</h1><p class="sub">`r n_pub` publications · `r citations` citations · h-index `r h_index`</p></div></div>
<div class="cite-list">
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis
# Generated automatically from publications.bib — same logic as before
# (year groupings + numbering), only the styling (styles.scss) changes.
q <- capture.output(print(d, .opts = list(sorting = "ydnt", bib.style = "authoryear",
                                           max.names = 1, dashed = FALSE, style = "html")))
index <- length(d)
current_year <- 9999
for (i in seq_along(q)) {
  to_print <- q[i]
  if (i < length(q) - 1) if (stringr::str_detect(q[i + 1], "\\(20[0-9][0-9]\\)\\.")) {
    new_year <- stringr::str_extract(q[i + 1], "[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]")
    if (new_year != current_year) {
      current_year <- new_year
      cat(glue::glue('<div class="yearLabel">{current_year}</div>'), "\n\n")
    }
  }
  if (stringr::str_detect(to_print, "<p><cite>")) {
    to_print <- stringr::str_replace(to_print, "<p><cite>", glue::glue("<p><cite>[{index}] "))
    index <- index - 1
  }
  cat(to_print, "\n")
}
```

```{=html}
</div>

<div class="foot"><span class="mail"><a href="mailto:hello@rwhite.no">hello@rwhite.no</a></span><div class="links"><a href="https://github.com/raubreywhite">GitHub</a><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=75oKEWoAAAAJ">Scholar</a><a href="writing.xml">RSS</a></div></div>
</div>
```
